expected_intents: load the dashboard and understand the primary metric at a glance
filter, date-range, and segment the data
drill from a summary into detail and back
handle empty, loading, partial, and error states per widget
export or share a view / report
act on a row (edit, assign, resolve) where applicable
critical_paths: load -> primary metric legible -> filter -> data updates correctly
widget data fails -> that widget shows an error, page stays usable
common_failure_modes: one failed widget breaks or blanks the whole page
filters silently return stale or unfiltered data
no empty-state; a blank chart reads as broken
back / reload loses filter and drill state
no indication of data freshness or timezone
export reflects the unfiltered set, not the current view
often_missing_paths: recover a single failed widget without a full reload
share or deep-link the current filtered view
see when the data was last updated
evidence_cautions: do not mutate real admin records; blocked -> evidence debt
large exports against prod may be avoided -> evidence debt
